_note: Issue #677 (PM-4 sister bug subsumed by broad scope): the classification abbreviation 'S' appears in a banner line; banners require the spelled-out classification per CAPCO-2016 §D.1 p27 line 555 ("The classification level must be in English without abbreviation"). The rule's US-classification branch reads attrs.classification and matches the offending token's text against Classification::portion_str().
